name: VaultSparkStudios.github.io
currentFocus: Session 84 closed out: 7 S80 Tier 2/3/4 items shipped at quality bar across two `/go` rounds. Studio nav dropdown propagated across 79 HTML files — /social/ + /press/ now first-class nav destinations. Dynamic hero spotlight between hero sub-copy and CTAs showing highest-progress SPARKED or FORGE title. PWA push opt-in prompt on /studio-pulse/ + /vault-wall/ + /changelog/ deep-linking to #push anchor in portal. Two items still HAR-deferred (unchanged from S83): Ask IGNIS (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) + 3-item edge-gate/CSP-nonce/rate-limit bundle (CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN).
nextMilestone: Watch first post-push Lighthouse + playwright-axe runs (now also exercising S84's 79-file nav propagation against the tightened budgets + dual-URL gate from S82/S83). Then next pickups: extract `public-intelligence.social` into the shared `website-public` contract for Studio Hub consumption (zero-risk cohesion win); ship category-aware send-push edge function + push_preferences column to close the second half of S80 Tier 4 push item. ETERNAL tier vocabulary remains a founder-only CANON decision. CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN still the highest-leverage single founder action (unlocks 3 Tier 1 items).
blockers: CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN missing — blocks edge-gating private portals, CSP nonce migration, and rate-limit/CSRF on forms (3 S80 Tier 1 infrastructure items)
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY missing in Supabase edge-function secrets — blocks Ask IGNIS concierge and future AI surfaces
